title: Elliptic Curve Cryptography
description: Elliptic curve cryptography maps finite-field arithmetic into group operations used for Bitcoin keys and signatures. It is the practical cryptographic system behind secp256k1.

resources.title: Programming Bitcoin
resources.notes: Deeper walk-through of the cryptography, scripting, and transaction mechanics behind this topic.

resources.title: secp256k1 README
resources.notes: Library-level reference for curve operations used in production software.

resources.title: Bitcoin Core Academy: Glossary
resources.notes: Terminology bridge between cryptography primitives and Bitcoin Core concepts.
